main.description: Called via redirect from the age verification service. This endpoint will attempt to verify the result, and then redirect to user back to the Bluesky app.

status.description: The status of the age verification process.

externalPayload.description: Additional metadata provided when initiating age verification.

signature.description: SHA256 HMAC signature of the status and externalPayload, separated by a colon (:), and signed with the facilitating service's private key.

status.description: The computed status of the age verification process.
